152	//
153	// Both ExecuteBead and Land() are serialized per projectRoot. This is required
154	// because ExecuteBead calls CommitTracker (which acquires the git index lock)
155	// and because Land() uses CAS-based UpdateRefTo. In production, the server
156	// dispatches one bead per worker and serializes Land() via the LandCoordinator
157	// goroutine; in integration tests, the same mutex handles both.

161	func scriptHarnessExecutor(t *testing.T, projectRoot, directivePath string) ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc {

164		// calls do not race on BuiltinCatalog (NewRunner is not goroutine-safe

182			res, err := ExecuteBeadWithConfig(ctx, projectRoot, beadID, rcfg, ExecuteBeadRuntime{
183				AgentRunner: runner,
184			}, gitOps)
185			if err != nil {

188				}

197				LandingAdvancer: func(r *ExecuteBeadResult) (*LandResult, error) {
198					// landMutexFor is already held (repoMu == landMutexFor(projectRoot)).
199					req := BuildLandRequestFromResult(projectRoot, r)

201				},
202			})

1	package cmd

3	import (
4		"os"

11	)

13	// TestZeroConfigWork_NoConfigDoesNotEmitUnderSpecified covers ddx-b790449b AC1
14	// and AC2: a project with .ddx/beads.jsonl but no .ddx/config.yaml must drain
15	// against the global agent config defaults instead of failing with the
16	// upstream "routing under-specified" error. The test sets HOME to a temp
17	// directory holding a minimal agent config and runs `ddx work --once`
18	// programmatically. It asserts:
19	//   - the command does not return "routing under-specified" (the regression
20	//     this hot-fix addresses)
21	//   - no .ddx/config.yaml is created as a side effect of the run
22	//
23	// Real provider dispatch is not exercised: the bead's actual execution may
24	// fail because the temp config points at an unreachable endpoint, but that
25	// failure is downstream of the routing decision and unrelated to AC1.
26	func TestZeroConfigWork_NoConfigDoesNotEmitUnderSpecified(t *testing.T) {
27		projectDir := t.TempDir()
28		ddxDir := filepath.Join(projectDir, ".ddx")
29		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(ddxDir, 0o755))
30	
31		// Single trivial open bead so the loop has something to route.
32		beads := `{"id":"test-zero-cfg-1","title":"trivial","type":"task","status":"open","priority":3,"created_at":"2026-05-01T00:00:00Z","updated_at":"2026-05-01T00:00:00Z"}` + "\n"
33		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(ddxDir, "beads.jsonl"), []byte(beads), 0o644))
34	
35		// Synthesize a HOME with a minimal global agent config so the
36		// providersHasProviders precheck passes. The provider points at a
37		// localhost port no test will ever bind — actual dispatch will fail
38		// but the routing-under-specified gate must not.
39		homeDir := t.TempDir()
40		agentCfgDir := filepath.Join(homeDir, ".config", "agent")
41		require.NoError(t, os.MkdirAll(agentCfgDir, 0o755))
42		agentCfg := `providers:
43	  testprov:
44	    type: lmstudio
45	    base_url: http://127.0.0.1:1
46	    api_key: test
47	    model: test-model
48	default_provider: testprov
49	`
50		require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(agentCfgDir, "config.yaml"), []byte(agentCfg), 0o644))
51	
52		t.Setenv("HOME", homeDir)
53		t.Setenv("XDG_CONFIG_HOME", filepath.Join(homeDir, ".config"))
54	
55		factory := NewCommandFactory(projectDir)
56		root := factory.NewRootCommand()
57		out, err := executeCommand(root, "work", "--once", "--project", projectDir)
58	
59		combined := out
60		if err != nil {
61			combined = combined + " | err=" + err.Error()
62		}
63		// AC1/AC2: the upstream "routing under-specified" message must not surface
64		// for a config-less project when the global config has at least one
65		// provider. If it does, the zero-config fall-through is broken.
66		assert.NotContainsf(t, strings.ToLower(combined), "routing under-specified",
67			"zero-config drain must not emit routing-under-specified; got: %s", combined)
68	
69		// AC1: ddx work must not write .ddx/config.yaml as a side effect.
70		_, statErr := os.Stat(filepath.Join(ddxDir, "config.yaml"))
71		assert.True(t, os.IsNotExist(statErr),
72			"zero-config drain must not create .ddx/config.yaml (statErr=%v)", statErr)
73	}
